_comment: Memory subsystem config. Read by .agent0/tools/memory-query.sh and memory-project.sh. Override values per-fork; missing keys fall back to documented defaults. Out-of-spec keys are ignored with a memory-config-advisory.

cap._comment_max_line_chars: Maximum characters per projected line in .agent0/memory/MEMORY.md. Overflow emits a memory-cap-advisory at projection time; no auto-truncation. Default 250 chars.

decay._comment_threshold_days: Staleness threshold. Entries with score > threshold_days surface in the decay readout. Default 60 days.
decay._comment_confirm_boost_days: Each confirmed_count increment discounts this many days from the staleness score. Formula: score = (today - last_accessed_or_created_at).days - confirmed_count * confirm_boost_days. Default 14 days (2 weeks per confirm).
